name: Calendar Spread (Time Spread)
description: Buy a longer-dated option and sell a shorter-dated option at the same strike. Profits from time decay differential and IV term structure.
entry_rules: Enter when IV term structure is in contango (front IV < back IV is normal; look for steeper than usual)
Place at ATM or slightly OTM strike
Prefer when front-month IV rank is elevated
Max debit should not exceed 30% of strike width potential
exit_rules: Close when front option expires or near expiration
Close if underlying moves beyond breakeven range
Close if IV term structure inverts significantly
roll_rules: After front expiry, sell new front-month against back-month
Adjust strike if underlying has moved significantly
Do not roll if back-month has less than 14 DTE remaining
objective: Profit from faster time decay of short-dated option relative to longer-dated option

risk_profile.max_profit: Occurs when underlying is at strike at front expiration
risk_profile.breakeven: Depends on IV; approximately strike +/- debit paid

best_environment: Range-bound market, contango term structure, upcoming event in front month increases front IV
